title: BOQ Project Summary
description: The campus-level roll-up: every building and floor totalled in one place.

steps.title: Campus total
steps.description: Every building's cost, summed for the project.
steps.voiceScript: This summary rolls up every building into the project total.
steps.captionText: This summary rolls up every building into the project total.
steps.fallbackMessage: Campus total: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Per-building breakdown
steps.description: Drill from the total into any building.
steps.voiceScript: Each building's contribution is listed so you can drill into it.
steps.captionText: Each building's contribution is listed so you can drill into it.
steps.fallbackMessage: Per-building breakdown: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Export
steps.description: The summary prints as a client-ready cost document.
steps.voiceScript: Export the summary as a client-ready cost document.
steps.captionText: Export the summary as a client-ready cost document.
steps.fallbackMessage: Export: not visible on this screen yet.
